summary: Replaced raw shell commands in gen-test-scripts SKILL.md Step 4 and Step 5 with just commands. Step 4 post-generation check now uses `just e2e-verify --feature <slug>` with explicit 'exit 1 = skill incomplete' hard gate note. Step 5 deps install now uses `just e2e-setup`.
keyDecisions: Used exact phrase 'exit 1 = skill incomplete' to satisfy acceptance criteria AC3
Kept targeted edits only — no restructuring of SKILL.md

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Step 4 prose contains 'exit 1 = skill incomplete' note
